text.title: Solo Support SLA Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Policy lists 'reply <1h always'; operator burns out in 8 weeks.
antipattern.fix: Explicit business hours + after-hours canned reply; defer non-emergency tickets.

antipattern.symptom: Policy lists 6 tiers; operator cannot remember which gets what.
antipattern.root-cause: Each new customer category got its own tier.

antipattern.symptom: Paying customer waits 4 days; churns silently.
antipattern.fix: Define concrete trigger (48h no-reply paying customer → phone).

antipattern.symptom: Canned reply tone reads as condescending ('did you check docs?').
antipattern.fix: Tone-review canned replies; explicit kindness even when redirecting to docs.
